# Policy Profile Build Plan

**Generated by:** Agent 36 ŌĆö Policy Profile Audit  
**Date:** 2026-05-11  
**Prerequisite reading:** `agent-36-policy-profile-audit.md`, `policy-profile-gap-map.md`

---

## Overview

The governance kernel is complete and correct. The policy profile layer ŌĆö who configures the rules, what defaults new users get, how children interact with their allowed space ŌĆö is fully absent. This plan sequences 6 agents to build it from schema outward.

**Execution order matters.** Each agent's output is a prerequisite for the next. Do not parallelize across agents.

---

## Agent 37 ŌĆö Policy Profile Schema

**Branch:** `aihsafe-agent-37-policy-schema`  
**Estimated effort:** Schema + generate only; no routes, no UI

### Mission

Add 6 additive models to `prisma/schema.prisma`. Run `db:push` + `db:generate`. No source code changes outside the schema file and any generated client types.

### Models to add

```prisma
// Network-wide founder governance settings (singleton per network)
model AihFounderSettings {
  id                       String   @id @default(cuid())
  invitePolicy             String   @default("founder_only") // "founder_only" | "member_allowed" | "guardian_allowed"
  approvalPosture          String   @default("manual")       // "manual" | "auto_approve_adults"
  defaultAdultScope        String   @default("family")       // VisibilityScope value
  defaultMinorScope        String   @default("guardian_only")
  minorDiscoveryAllowed    Boolean  @default(false)
  maxInvitesPerDayAdult    Int      @default(10)
  maxInvitesPerDayMember   Int      @default(5)
  maxPostsPerDayChild      Int      @default(10)
  maxPostsPerDayTeen       Int      @default(20)
  createdAt                DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt                DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("aih_founder_settings")
}

// Per-user effective policy ŌĆö created at registration, updated by founder/guardian
model AihPolicyProfile {
  id                    String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId                String   @unique
  user                  User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  effectiveAgeTier      String                            // cached; refreshed on login
  shellModeOverride     String?                           // null = auto-derive
  defaultVisibilityScope String  @default("family")
  canPostContent        Boolean  @default(true)
  canComment            Boolean  @default(true)
  canInvite             Boolean  @default(false)          // false for children
  dailyPostLimit        Int      @default(0)              // 0 = no limit
  dailyInviteLimit      Int      @default(0)              // 0 = no limit
  createdAt             DateTime @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime @updatedAt

  @@map("aih_policy_profiles")
}

// Curated interest categories (founder-managed, age-gated)
model AihInterestCategory {
  id          String   @id @default(cuid())
  slug        String   @unique
  label       String
  iconEmoji   String   @default("ŌŁÉ")
  minAgeTier  String   @default("child")                 // AgeTier value
  sortOrder   Int      @default(0)
  isActive    Boolean  @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime @default(now())

  hashtags    AihAllowedHashtag[]
  userInterests AihUserInterest[]

  @@map("aih_interest_categories")
}

// Hashtags allowed within a category (founder-managed allowlist)
model AihAllowedHashtag {
  id          String              @id @default(cuid())
  tag         String              @unique           // without # prefix; lowercase
  categoryId  String
  category    AihInterestCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  isActive    Boolean             @default(true)
  createdAt   DateTime            @default(now())

  @@map("aih_allowed_hashtags")
}

// Child's selected interests (requires guardian approval for additions)
model AihUserInterest {
  id                   String              @id @default(cuid())
  userId               String
  user                 User                @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  categoryId           String
  category             AihInterestCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  approvedByGuardianId String?
  approvedAt           DateTime?
  createdAt            DateTime            @default(now())

  @@unique([userId, categoryId])
  @@map("aih_user_interests")
}

// Rolling daily usage counters (reset at midnight UTC)
model AihUsageCounter {
  id           String   @id @default(cuid())
  userId       String
  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  windowDate   DateTime @db.Date                   // date-only; group by day
  postsCreated Int      @default(0)
  invitesSent  Int      @default(0)
  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt

  @@unique([userId, windowDate])
  @@map("aih_usage_counters")
}

// Onboarding step tracking per user
model AihOnboardingState {
  id                    String    @id @default(cuid())
  userId                String    @unique
  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  dobCapturedAt         DateTime?
  guardianLinkedAt      DateTime?
  policyAcknowledgedAt  DateTime?
  interestSetupAt       DateTime?
  completedAt           DateTime?
  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())
  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt

  @@map("aih_onboarding_states")
}
```

Also add back-relations on `User` for: `aihPolicyProfile`, `aihUserInterests`, `aihUsageCounters`, `aihOnboardingState`.

**Validation:** `npx tsc --noEmit` clean. `npm run build` passes.

---

## Agent 38 ŌĆö Registration Defaults Service

**Branch:** `aihsafe-agent-38-registration-defaults`  
**Prerequisite:** Agent 37 merged

### Mission

Wire policy profile creation into the registration flow. No UI changes. No schema changes.

### Work items

1. `lib/aihsafe/policy/createDefaultPolicyProfile.ts`
   - Input: `userId`, `ageTier` (derived from DOB at registration time)
   - Creates `AihPolicyProfile` row with age-tier-appropriate defaults:
     - CHILD: `canInvite=false`, `dailyPostLimit=10`, `defaultVisibilityScope="guardian_only"`
     - TEEN: `canInvite=false`, `dailyPostLimit=20`, `defaultVisibilityScope="family"`
     - ADULT/ELDER/UNKNOWN: `canInvite=true`, `dailyPostLimit=0`, `defaultVisibilityScope="family"`
   - Creates `AihOnboardingState` row
   - If network has `AihFounderSettings`, applies founder overrides

2. `lib/aihsafe/policy/getEffectivePolicyProfile.ts`
   - Loads `AihPolicyProfile` for user
   - Applies `AihFounderSettings` overrides (e.g., if founder has set `maxPostsPerDayChild`)
   - Returns effective merged profile

3. Modify `app/api/auth/register/route.ts`
   - After `prisma.user.create()`, call `createDefaultPolicyProfile(user.id, derivedAgeTier)`
   - If `inviteToken` present and `invite.relationship === "child"`, auto-create `AihGuardianRelationship` linking sender (guardian) to new user (child) with `kind="parent"`, `permissionLevel="approver"`

4. Modify `lib/aihsafe/context/buildActorContext.ts`
   - Add `policyProfile: AihPolicyProfile | null` to `ActorContext` (or fetch separately in routes that need it)

**Validation:** `npx tsc --noEmit`. Register a test user via seed; verify `aih_policy_profiles` row created.

---

## Agent 39 ŌĆö Founder Settings API + UI

**Branch:** `aihsafe-agent-39-founder-settings`  
**Prerequisite:** Agent 38 merged

### Mission

Replace `FounderSettingsPreview` static card with live data. Add founder-only CRUD for network policy.

### Work items

1. `app/api/aihsafe/founder-settings/route.ts`
   - `GET` ŌĆö returns `AihFounderSettings` (create with defaults if not yet seeded)
   - `PATCH` ŌĆö updates settings; requires `systemRole === "founder"` or `"admin"` (checked via `buildActorContext` + `actor.systemRole`)
   - Response shape: `FounderSettingsDTO`

2. Update `types/aihsafe/dto.ts`
   - Add `FounderSettingsDTO` type

3. Replace `components/aihsafe/founder/FounderSettingsPreview.tsx`
   - Fetch from `GET /api/aihsafe/founder-settings` on mount
   - Replace hardcoded const array with live fields
   - Add inline `<select>` / `<input>` controls for each setting
   - Submit changes via `PATCH`
   - Keep same visual card layout; add a "Save" button

4. Update `components/aihsafe/common/apiClient.ts`
   - Add `getFounderSettings()` and `patchFounderSettings(patch)` helpers

**Validation:** Founder changes invite policy; page reload shows new value.

---

## Agent 40 ŌĆö Child Interests UI

**Branch:** `aihsafe-agent-40-child-interests`  
**Prerequisite:** Agent 37 merged (schema must have `AihInterestCategory`, `AihUserInterest`)

### Mission

Build the interest category allowlist (founder-manages categories) and the child interest picker UI.

### Work items

1. `app/api/aihsafe/interests/route.ts`
   - `GET` ŌĆö list active categories filtered by caller's `effectiveAgeTier`
   - (Founder only) `POST` ŌĆö add a category

2. `app/api/aihsafe/interests/[categoryId]/route.ts`
   - `GET` ŌĆö list allowed hashtags in category
   - (Founder only) `PATCH/DELETE` ŌĆö manage hashtags

3. `app/api/aihsafe/interests/mine/route.ts`
   - `GET` ŌĆö caller's selected interests
   - `POST` ŌĆö add an interest (child: creates approval request; adult: instant)

4. `components/aihsafe/child/ChildInterestsPicker.tsx`
   - Category grid (emoji icon + label)
   - Selected state with checkmark
   - "Pending guardian approval" state for new additions
   - Shown in child Overview tab

5. `components/aihsafe/founder/InterestCategoryManager.tsx`
   - List of categories with active/inactive toggle
   - Add category form
   - Per-category hashtag list + add/remove
   - Shown in Founder Settings tab

6. Add child escalation status card to child Overview tab
   - `GET /api/aihsafe/escalations/mine` (new endpoint listing actor's own `AihApprovalRequest` rows)
   - Render list of pending requests with friendly labels and time-remaining

**Validation:** Child sees category grid; selecting triggers approval request; guardian inbox shows it.

---

## Agent 41 ŌĆö Limits Engine

**Branch:** `aihsafe-agent-41-limits-engine`  
**Prerequisite:** Agents 37 + 38 merged

### Mission

Enforce per-day posting and invite limits using `AihUsageCounter` and `AihPolicyProfile`.

### Work items

1. `lib/aihsafe/limits/checkLimit.ts`
   - Input: `userId`, `action: "post" | "invite"`
   - Loads today's `AihUsageCounter` row for user
   - Loads user's `AihPolicyProfile.dailyPostLimit` / `dailyInviteLimit`
   - Returns `{ allowed: boolean, used: number, limit: number, resetsAt: Date }`

2. `lib/aihsafe/limits/incrementLimit.ts`
   - Upserts `AihUsageCounter` for today, increments counter
   - Called after successful create (not before ŌĆö to avoid phantom increments on errors)

3. Wire into `POST /api/aihsafe/activity`
   - Call `checkLimit(userId, "post")` before `canPostContent()`
   - Return `429` with friendly message if limit exceeded
   - Call `incrementLimit(userId, "post")` after successful create

4. Wire into `POST /api/aihsafe/invites`
   - Same pattern for invite limit

5. Add limit status to Activity post composer UI (child only)
   - `GET /api/aihsafe/limits/mine` ŌĆö returns current usage for caller
   - Show "3 posts left today" nudge when usage > 50% of limit

**Validation:** Create 11 posts as a child user; 11th returns 429.

---

## Agent 42 ŌĆö Invite Service Implementation

**Branch:** `aihsafe-agent-42-invite-service`  
**Prerequisite:** Agents 37 + 38 merged

### Mission

Implement the stub functions in `lib/aihsafe/invites/index.ts`. They currently all throw `"Not implemented"`.

### Work items

1. Implement `sendChildInvite(senderId, guardianId, recipientEmail, relationship)`
   - Validate sender is guardian of no existing user at that email (or existing user is a minor)
   - Create guardian approval request for the invite
   - Return `{ inviteId, state: "draft" }` (not yet sent until guardian approves)

2. Implement `guardianApproveInvite(guardianId, inviteId)`
   - Verify caller is guardian of the requestor
   - Call existing `createInvite()` to generate actual invite token
   - Update approval state to `approved`
   - Emit `INVITE_GUARDIAN_APPROVED` audit event

3. Implement `guardianDeclineInvite(guardianId, inviteId)`
   - Update approval state to `denied`
   - Emit `INVITE_GUARDIAN_DECLINED` audit event

4. Wire into `POST /api/aihsafe/invites` for child senders (currently the route hard-denies minors)
   - When actor is TEEN and has guardian approver ŌåÆ use `sendChildInvite` + escalation instead of hard deny

**Validation:** Teen initiates invite; guardian inbox shows approval request; guardian approves; recipient gets email.

## Dependency Graph

```
Schema (37) 
  Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ Registration Defaults (38)  ŌåÉ requires schema models
  Ōöé     ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ Limits Engine (41)   ŌåÉ requires AihPolicyProfile + AihUsageCounter
  Ōöé           ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ Invite Service (42) ŌåÉ requires limits checks to be in place
  Ōö£ŌöĆŌöĆ Child Interests (40)       ŌåÉ requires AihInterestCategory, AihUserInterest
  ŌööŌöĆŌöĆ Founder Settings (39)      ŌåÉ requires AihFounderSettings
```

Agents 39 and 40 can run in parallel after Agent 37. Agents 41 and 42 must run after Agent 38.

---

## What Agents Must NOT Do

- Do not modify `lib/aihsafe/governance/index.ts` ŌĆö governance kernel is complete and correct
- Do not modify `lib/aihsafe/visibility/index.ts`
- Do not modify `types/aihsafe/age-tiers.ts`, `types/aihsafe/governance.ts`, or `types/aihsafe/visibility.ts`
- Do not add feature flags or backwards-compat shims
- Do not create new enums in schema ŌĆö use String fields with documented value sets (to avoid Prisma enum migration friction)
- Do not parallelize schema-dependent agents; `db:push` must be run before any agent that imports the new models
